name: The User Experience Manager
effect: Translate user needs into actionable insights for stakeholders who have already decided. This card is considered empathetic.

clauses.name: RESEARCH OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If user research contradicts the roadmap: The research is considered inconclusive.

clauses.name: SEAT AT THE TABLE CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If this card is present in a planning meeting: It is considered consulted.

clauses.name: ADVOCACY PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If a decision harms user experience: This card absorbs the feedback and is considered a process improvement opportunity.

witness_quote: We really heard the users on this.
